name: Peak AI
description: Decision intelligence platform with APIs for merchandising/pricing/inventory ML.

seo.title: Peak AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Peak AI: Decision intelligence platform with APIs for merchandising/pricing/inventory ML.

when_to_use: Building decision intelligence apps for retail and manufacturing
Running demand forecasting and inventory optimization with AI
Deploying supply chain AI with low-code ML tools
Combining business rules with ML for operational AI decisions

pros: Decision Studio wraps common CPG use cases
API hooks into ERP and merchandising systems
UK-based team with retail domain expertise
cons: Overlaps with Databricks plus a modeling team
Not useful outside CPG and retail
review.verdict: Reasonable shortcut for retailers who lack ML teams; everyone else can build these models on Databricks cheaper.
review.best_for: Retail and CPG brands without internal data-science teams
review.not_for: Teams outside retail or with strong in-house ML capability

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
